title: Crunchy Post-Workout Kenyan Umami Mashup
description: A refreshing and rejuvenating mashup of Kenyan flavors, featuring the sweetness of dried cherries and the earthiness of fermented beans, perfect for a post-workout snack.

ingredients.name: Kenyan spices
ingredients.notes: A mix of coriander, cumin, and paprika.

instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the roasted peanuts and cook for 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the fermented beans and cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the garlic, ginger, and Kenyan spices and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the cauliflower rice and stir to combine with the peanut mixture.
Cook for 3-4 minutes, stirring frequently, until the cauliflower rice is tender and lightly browned.
Stir in the dried cherries and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until they are heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, and serve hot.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and a drizzle of Sriracha sauce, if desired.
